Document:
# BARONESS-CLASS LEISURE SHUTTLE
[color=#a4885c]Ship Size:[/color] Medium
[color=#a4885c]Recommended Crew:[/color] 1-3
[color=#a4885c]Power Gen Type:[/color] Uranium
"A small luxury cruiser for one or two people, with a lounge, a private bedroom, and a hell of a cockpit view."
[italic]Brought to you by BlueBird Starship Design & Construction.[/italic]
# NOTICE TO CAPTAINS
[bold]The Baroness is designed for relaxation and exploration.[/bold] It does not feature equipment traditionally associated with profit generation.
